CreateAccessPoint.description: Grants permission to create a new access point

CreateBucket.description: Grants permission to create a new bucket

CreateSession.description: Grants permission to Create Session token which is used for object APIs such as PutObject, GetObject, etc

DeleteAccessPoint.description: Grants permission to delete the access point named in the URI

DeleteAccessPointPolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the policy on a specified access point

DeleteAccessPointScope.description: Grants permission to delete the scope configuration on a specified access point

DeleteBucket.description: Grants permission to delete the bucket named in the URI

DeleteBucketPolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the policy on a specified bucket

GetAccessPoint.description: Grants permission to return configuration information about the specified access point

GetAccessPointPolicy.description: Grants permission to return the access point policy associated with the specified access point

GetAccessPointScope.description: Grants permission to return the scope configuration associated with the specified access point

GetBucketPolicy.description: Grants permission to return the policy of the specified bucket

GetEncryptionConfiguration.description: Grants permission to return the default encryption configuration for a directory bucket

GetLifecycleConfiguration.description: Grants permission to return the lifecycle configuration information set on a directory bucket

ListAccessPointsForDirectoryBuckets.description: Grants permission to list access points

ListAllMyDirectoryBuckets.description: Grants permission to list all directory buckets owned by the authenticated sender of the request

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to lists all of the tags for a specified resource

PutAccessPointPolicy.description: Grants permission to associate an access policy with a specified access point

PutAccessPointScope.description: Grants permission to associate an access point with a specified access point scope configuration

PutBucketPolicy.description: Grants permission to add or replace a bucket policy on a bucket

PutEncryptionConfiguration.description: Grants permission to set the encryption configuration for a directory bucket

PutLifecycleConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create a new lifecycle configuration for the directory bucket or replace an existing lifecycle configuration

TagResource.description: Grants permission to create a new user-defined tag or update an existing tag

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove the specified user-defined tags from an S3 resource

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

s3express:AccessPointNetworkOrigin.description: Filters access by the network origin (Internet or VPC)

s3express:AccessPointTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the access point

s3express:AllAccessRestrictedToLocalZone.description: Filters access by AWS Local Zone network border group(s) provided in this condition key

s3express:BucketTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the bucket

s3express:DataAccessPointAccount.description: Filters access by the AWS Account ID that owns the access point

s3express:DataAccessPointArn.description: Filters access by an access point Amazon Resource Name (ARN)

s3express:LocationName.description: Filters access by a specific Availability Zone or Local Zone ID

s3express:Permissions.description: Filters access by the permission requested by Access Point Scope configuration, such as GetObject, PutObject

s3express:ResourceAccount.description: Filters access by the resource owner AWS account ID

s3express:SessionMode.description: Filters access by the permission requested by CreateSession API, such as ReadOnly and ReadWrite

s3express:TlsVersion.description: Filters access by the TLS version used by the client

s3express:signatureAge.description: Filters access by the age in milliseconds of the request signature

s3express:signatureversion.description: Filters access by the AWS Signature Version used on the request

s3express:x-amz-content-sha256.description: Filters access by unsigned content in your bucket

s3express:x-amz-server-side-encryption-a.description: Filters access by AWS KMS customer managed key for server-side encryption
